titleStmt.title: SII 17.700: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 700. (A.R. No. 643 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.

The details of date, viz., Pramāthin, Makara, ba. 10, Śōdi(svāti), Sunday are irregular. Palaeographically the inscription may be assigned to the latter half of the 14th century and hence the cyclic year and the month viz., Pramāthin, Makara will correspond to 1400 A.D., January, falling in the reign of Harihara II.

This inscription records the gift of Vēlūr as dēvadāna to the temple of Tirukkārikaraiuḍaiya nāyaṉār in Naḍuvu-malai in Niṉṟaiyūr-nāḍu, a district of Kuṉṟavattanakkōṭṭam, a sub-division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by the cultivators (ēr-vallavar) of Vēlūr.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī
maṉmahāmaṇḍa
liśvara śrīvi
raharihararāya
ṉṉukkuc cel
lāniṉṟa piṟa
māti caṅkavaṟca
rattu makara nāya
ṟṟu Apara pakka
ṣattu tecami
yum nāyaṟṟu
kkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa coti nā
ḷ ceyaṅkoṇ
ṭa coḻa maṇṭa
lattuk kuṉ
ṟa vattaṉak
koṭṭattu
niṉṟaiūr
nāṭṭu naṭuvu
malai Uṭai
yār tirukkā
rikarai Uṭai
ya nāyaṉārk
ku Iṉṉāṭṭu
Iṉ(ṉāya ṉāya)
ṉāyaṉār teva
tāṉam ve
lūriṟkkā
ṇi Āḷar Er
vallava
varkaḷ In
ta velū
r Eṅka
ḷ kāṇi
Āṭci nā
ṟpāṟk
kellai
muṟṟum
maṉai
yum maṉai
ppaṭṭa
paiyum
maramuṅ
kiṇaṟum
Uṭpaṭṭa
cakala camu
tāyamu
m tirunā
mattukkā
ṇi Āka Utakam
paṇṇik ku
ṭuttom ve
lūril lervalla
varkaḷom .
Ippaṭikku I
vai Er valla
vaṉ viḻuppa
raiyaṉ mutali
nāyaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai Er
vallavaṉ A
ḻakiya varataṉ
Ippaṭikku I
vai vicaiya
rāyaṉ kārinā
yaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku I
vai Er valla
vaṉ ciraṅkanā
taṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai
tiruveṅkaṭa
muṭaiyāṉ vira
nāraciṅkaveḷān Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Eri
vallavaṉ perumā
ḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivar colla E
ḻutiṉamaikku
velūr Ūravark ka
ṇakku koṟṟapākka
m Uṭaiyāṉ Inta
tirunāmattukkāṇikka kaṇakkuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.700 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
